description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a light-colored, wooden handle with a pronounced ergonomic curve for improved grip and control. The handle is adorned with dark, circular engravings near both ends, adding a decorative or possibly symbolic touch. The axe head is forged from dark metal, with a broad, angular blade and a slightly textured, matte finish. The blade has a single cutting edge and a pronounced beard, extending downward for increased chopping efficiency. The mounting of the blade to the handle appears traditional, with the wood passing through the eye of the axe head and secured in place. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and aesthetic detail, suitable for both practical use and display.
description: A curved wooden-handled axe with a dark, broad metal blade and decorative engravings on the handle. The axe combines functional design with ornamental details.
description_view_0: The left side of the axe shows the full curve of the wooden handle, the engraved symbol near the end, and the broad, angular blade with its textured metal surface.
description_view_1: A direct end-on view of the axe, showing the thin profile of the handle and the narrow edge of the blade.
description_view_2: The right side of the axe reveals the opposite face of the handle, another engraved symbol, and the full shape of the blade's beard and poll.
description_view_3: A top-down view highlights the alignment of the handle with the blade and the rectangular cross-section of the axe head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with ergonomic grip, oval cross-section, and decorative engravings near both ends.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, broad, angular steel blade with a pronounced beard and a matte, textured finish.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle passing through the eye of the blade.
